event.description:
Join us & Samuel Hoffman ( https://www.linkedin.com/in/shoffman5/ ) at this meetup to learn about Trusting AI & AI Fairness ( https://www.ibm.com/blogs/research/2018/09/ai-fairness-360/ )
You will also find out how you can contribute to the project

The agenda is emerging
- 6:15 Networking
- 6:30pm Intro to Trusting AI & Fairness in AI - 20 mins
- 6:50pm Intro to the AI fairness 360 Project & Tutorials - 20 minutes
- 7:10pm Intro to the code https://github.com/IBM/AIF360 - and an outline of areas you can contribute to - 10 minutes

group.name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC

event.title: Trusting AI : AI Fairness

meetup_name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC
